g.text: • Premiership • Season 1 • Week 2/38 • Cash £2,649k • Next: vs West Ham (H) • Tactic 4-4-2
Another thinking move across the pitch
A flick on from _P1_ waits for the one two
_P1_ traps it with his thigh and flicks on to _P0_
A flick on from _P1_ waits for the one two
A neat dummy run and pass
A ball in by _P1_ taken by _P0_
_P1_ needles it through the opponent's feet and finds _P0_
